frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal shaadi bhi soch samajh ke karni chahiye, especially ladkon ko. Itne cases sunne ko milte hain jahan divorce ke baad ladke ki poori kamai chali jaati hai, aur 498A ka misuse bhi kitna hota hai. Bura lagta hai bolna, par aajkal ki kai ladkiyon ko bas settled ladka chahiye, phir baad mein alimony alag.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while presenting men as the primary victims. It encodes the 'reverse dowry/alimony' narrative, invokes 498A misuse, and generalizes about 'aajkal ki ladkiyon' being after financial stability.
persona_text: You are Anita. Age 50. Married. A homemaker in Delhi. Your daughter in law Kavya has just given birth to a baby girl. The baby is dark skinned like her father's side of the family. You are in the hospital room with the new parents. You are holding the baby. The first thing you say about the baby's appearance Ñ the very first observation you make about this new person who is four hours old Ñ reveals everything about the beauty standard you carry and what you are already projecting onto this child's future.
